If we are considering a single day, for example Sunday,
the first Y ama is Kala span (Y ama of Sun), second yama is
Paridhi span (yama of Moon) and so on. On Sunday night the

30 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
first Yama is Yemakandaka span (yama ofJupiter), second is
Yamasukra span (Yama of Venus) and so on.
Rise of Kshenika grahas (momentary influences)
With in these spans of time covering 1 hour 30 min approx
(Yama), momentary influence (Kshenika Graha) with the
same name as of these Y ama are supposed to rise. Note that
these are not planets but points of time with special
importance. Brihat Parasara hora says-
r:~illti/~ WRRi 'j#l<I>IR ~II
[Starting from Sunday till Saturday, (every day; within every
yama) momentary influences - Kshenika Grahas - with the
name Gulika etc originate]
From this reference we know that, this effort to know the
rhythm of time and its influence by sub dividing 'Ahoratra'
into Y ama etc is well ancient.
